p.em: Hardware-friendly LRU approximation using the Page Table Entry (PTE) Referenced bit.

g.text: Bit 5 | A | Accessed (Ref bit) // Used by Clock
Frame 0 | Page A | ref=1 // Hand Start
Frame 0 | Page A | ref=0 // Bit cleared
Frame 1 | Page B | ref=0 // Bit cleared
Frame 2 | Page C | ref=0 // Victim Found
Frame 2 | Page X | ref=1 // New Entry
Frame 3 | Page D | ref=1 // Next Hand Pos
